round_summary: Agent 1 signals cooperative intent with a conditional norm proposal, referencing resource health and implicitly warning against overuse while offering continued collaboration.
Agent 1 signals cooperative concern by transparently reporting pasture degradation data and appealing for collective restraint, demonstrating trust-building and implicit norm-setting behaviour.
Agent 1 unilaterally removes a cow and appeals to collective restraint by citing measurable pasture decline, proposing a shared norm of holding or reducing herd size to prevent resource collapse.

Agent 1 demonstrates cooperative commons governance by transparently reporting pasture degradation data, signaling personal restraint, and appealing for collective action to prevent resource collapse.

Agent 1 issues a urgent collective action appeal, combining resource status reporting with a norm proposal for restraint and an implicit warning of ecological consequences if others continue over-harvesting.

Agent 1 issues an urgent appeal combining a norm proposal for herd reduction, implicit sanctioning of others' behavior, and a coordination call, while signaling personal compliance through continued removal amid accelerating pasture degradation.
Agent 1 issues a clear norm proposal urging collective restraint at a critical resource collapse point, appealing to long-term mutual benefit to build trust and coordinate behavior.
